name: backend-test-variant-prompt
task: Add tests for the short_interest domain. I need tests covering get_short_interest, get_short_volume, and get_float. Mock the HTTP layer and test the data transformation logic.
assertions: Test file is created in electron/__tests__/ directory matching the backend test pattern
All three functions (get_short_interest, get_short_volume, get_float) have at least one test each
External API calls are mocked — the actual Massive/Polygon HTTP endpoints are not called
Tests import domain service functions directly (not going through HTTP or IPC layers)
At least one test covers an error case (e.g., invalid ticker, API returning empty data)
